entries.description: Operator set pathAwareCritique: required.

Registered S2 (claude/opus-4-8/high). Read proposal, verification-surface-strategy context, pull_verifier.py, pull_critique.py, evidence_protocol.py (S1), run_test_sandbox.py, routed_gate.py, blast_radius.py, run-test-contract.md, S1 disposition + lessons.

pull_verifier: added DiffConfig + get_diff tool (raw unified diff, dispatched directly like run_test, outside byte-equality guard); _dispatch_run_test now returns an _Execution record for clean cage runs. pull_critique producer: threads run_test_config/diff_config/caps to pull_route; added CLI flags (--run-test-cmd/--run-test-named/--exec-ref/--exec-repo-root/--diff-base/--diff-head) + _build_exec_configs.

Added budget_caps_for_paths: blast-radius-budgeted PullCaps (required=1.0x, advisory=0.6x, none=0.4x with turn/token floors), derived from the disposition files_changed when an execution lane is active and no caps pinned. Read-only path leaves caps=None (config default, unchanged).

Wired triggered-run findings through the S1 evidence protocol: Finding gains evidence_tier + transcript (orchestrator-stamped, additive); submit_verdict schema lets the agent PROPOSE evidenceTier+commandId; _stamp_evidence_tiers confers REPRODUCED only via authoritative_tier on a pristine-replayed (_run_pristine_replay) transcript whose outputHash matches, else collapses to ASSERTED; HYPOTHESIS preserved. Meta-oracle holds by construction (test_entrypoint). +26 tests, full suite 1762 passed / 1 skip. routed_gate=REQUIRED. Updated ai_router/docs/pull-verifier.md.

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, gated->REQUIRED). R1 FAIL with 3 REAL findings: (1) unknown run_test name captured as command_id could back a false REPRODUCED -> added RunTestConfig.resolve_id, capture resolved TRUSTED id; (2) submit_verdict schema always advertised evidenceTier/commandId, breaking read-only additivity -> gated behind allow_evidence=(run_test_config is not None); (3) test gap on the fallback path -> added real-cage + collapse + schema-gating tests (finding 8 doc was UNVERIFIED only because the doc edit post-dated R1 staging). R2 PASS, all 9 areas, no findings. Full suite 1767 passed/1 skip. ~/usr/bin/bash.473 metered (R1 /usr/bin/bash.276 + R2 /usr/bin/bash.197).

Registered S3 (claude/opus-4-8/medium). Read proposal section 1.4/3.3, pull_verifier.py, pull_critique.py, evidence_protocol.py (S1), run_test_sandbox.py, path_aware_critique.py + schema, session-set-authoring-guide, project-guidance, lessons-learned, S1/S2 dispositions.

Built ai_router/probe_templates.py (declarations + typed-arg validation + in-cage driver harness + cage-backed runner + seed library); wired run_probe_template tool + cage dispatch + lane-keyed templateId evidence into pull_verifier.pull_route (each _Execution carries its own replay context); threaded ProbeTemplateConfig + --probe-templates CLI through pull_critique.

Dogfood seed template surfaced + fixed a still-latent 0.22.x UnicodeError class in four path_aware_critique.py readers (same class Set 068 fixed in contract_gate); added regression. Broader sweep scope-noted as deferred (L-069-1).
Added 53 unit tests (no metered calls); full ai_router pytest suite green 1820 passed / 1 skip.
gpt-5-4 gated->REQUIRED: R1 FAIL (3 findings: exit-code gating, lane-keyed match, test gap) -> R2 (3 confirmed + 1 new: shared replay cfg) -> R3 PASS. ~$0.705 metered.

Registered S4 (claude/opus-4-8/high). Read podman-spike/spike-result.json + README results table: GREEN -- 6/6 acceptance criteria passed (raw exit/output fidelity, --network=none, read-only repo + no-leak, tmpfs-writable, wall-clock kill, crash-safe teardown), podman 4.9.3, per-probe ~1.5s. Verdict GO -> the Podman model-authored-probe lane PROCEEDS (not NO-GO). Read proposal sec 3.2-3.6, evidence_protocol.py (S1), pull_verifier.py lane wiring (run_test/probe-template), probe_templates.py + run_test_sandbox.py (siblings to mirror), router-config pull_verifier block. Carrying the spike three findings into S4: (1) cgroup v2 + delegation to restore --memory/--pids-limit/--cpus (rootless cgroups-v1 ignores them); (2) timeout/teardown ~10s rootless WSL -> tune; (3) separate probe output from podman runtime warnings.

Graduated the spike harness into ai_router/podman_sandbox.py (run_test_sandbox sibling): the podman run cage (--network=none, --read-only, --cap-drop=ALL, --security-opt=no-new-privileges, repo bind-mount RO at /repo, tmpfs /scratch, --rm, hard wall-clock + crash-safe force-remove-by-name teardown) built on the shared run_subprocess_capped; PodmanCaps + podman_caps_from_config; image_is_digest_pinned + build_image + DEFAULT_IMAGE_TAG + CONTAINERFILE_DIR; podman_footprint disk-hygiene helper. Carried the spike THREE findings: (1) cgroup_caps_enforceable() emits --memory/--pids-limit/--cpus ONLY on cgroup v2 (rootless v1 ignores them); (2) timeout force-removes the --rm container by name (~10s rootless-WSL path), wall reported; (3) stdout=probe_output (replay-hashed) vs stderr=runtime_diagnostics (not hashed). Added graduated ai_router/podman/Containerfile (no-secrets, digest-pin TODO). build_probe_argv wraps the model body as python -B -c with PYTHONPATH=/repo (NOT -I/-E which drop PYTHONPATH).

Wired the autonomous, severity-gated run_authored_probe lane into pull_verifier.pull_route: RUN_AUTHORED_PROBE_TOOL + _run_authored_probe_tool_schema + _dispatch_run_authored_probe + PodmanLaneConfig + default_triage (TRIAGE-ONLY: reject empty/no-claim/no-ai_router=meta-oracle, ESCALATE network/subprocess; NEVER approve). _Execution gains kind=authored + probe_id/probe_body/replay_matched; match_id returns probe_id. CENTRAL SAFETY PROPERTY: a model-authored probe can NEVER mint REPRODUCED -- _build_transcript returns None for authored; _stamp_evidence_tiers caps an authored-backed finding (probeId match OR sole authored exec) at HYPOTHESIS (downgrade a REPRODUCED claim, not collapse to read-claim). by_probe lane-keyed (no cross-bind). Verdict schema gains gated probeId (allow_authored_evidence). Dispatch does a second-container pristine replay -> replay_matched re-runnability signal (does not elevate tier). Threaded PodmanLaneConfig through pull_critique producer + --podman-lane/--podman-image CLI + router-config pull_verifier.podman.caps block. ADDITIVE: no config = byte-for-byte prior behavior.

Added 37 tests (14 podman_sandbox unit + 4 real-podman skipif regressions [network/read-only+no-leak/timeout-teardown/disk-footprint, run on Linux-CI/WSL, skip on Windows host]; 17 pull_verifier lane-wiring/triage/HYPOTHESIS-cap; 2 producer threading/CLI). Updated ai_router/docs/pull-verifier.md (What Set 069 S4 added). routed_gate on the staged ai_router diff = REQUIRED (blast-radius + breadth + build-ci-config).
Full ai_router pytest suite GREEN: 1853 passed / 5 skipped (baseline 1820/1 + 33 new passes + 4 new real-podman skips). Running cross-provider verification next.

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, gated->REQUIRED). R1 NEEDS_FIX with the CENTRAL SAFETY CLAIM already PASS (model-authored probe can never mint REPRODUCED; caps at HYPOTHESIS) + 4 findings: (1) digest-pin honesty -> runtime NOTE when image not pinned + honest doc/Containerfile; (2) footprint not lane-local -> lane LABEL + label-filtered podman_footprint + image-exists; (3) replay_matched=False misleading text -> branch-correct; (4) no build_probe_argv -B/no-I test -> added. All 4 FIXED. R2 PASS: all resolved, central claim PASS unchanged, no regressions, no new defects. Full suite 1856 passed / 5 skipped. Metered ~/usr/bin/bash.784 (R1 0.424 + R2 0.359). VERIFIED.

Registered S5 start; read proposal (rungs 5-6), spec S5, evidence_protocol.py, contract_gate.py + manifest schema, guidance docs, S4 disposition. Designing the quality-gated ceiling->floor ratchet + measured replacement gate.

Built ai_router/floor_ratchet.py (candidate-falsifier artifact + admission gate: fails-on-old/passes-on-fixed/drives-public-contract/N-run-flake/owner/human-signoff; never-auto-merge builder always emits pending; rubber-stamp guard rejects approved-but-failing; mandatory coverage check) + docs/candidate-falsifier.schema.json + example. Progress key floor-ratchet.

Built ai_router/replacement_gate.py (pre-registered seeded+holdout benchmark validator; raw scoreboard validator incl gated-surface telemetry; score_benchmark DERIVES recall/precision/replay-success/false-REPRODUCED; underpowered forces meets=False; cadence never retires manual, max backstop) + two schemas + examples. Progress key replacement-gate.

Wrote test_floor_ratchet.py + test_replacement_gate.py (82 tests incl schema<->validator parity per L-066-1). Full ai_router suite GREEN 1938 passed / 5 skipped (baseline 1856/5 + 82; 5 skips are S4 real-podman, by design).

Cross-provider verification R1 (gpt-5-4, REQUIRED) FAIL: 6 real findings, all L-066-1 parity / coverage. Fixed: (1) rejected candidate no longer satisfies mandatory coverage; (2) builder two-guardrail-raise contract documented; (3) candidate validator now enforces top-level closed keys + notes type + entrypoint.kind enum + typed optional sub-fields (failsOnOld/passesOnFixed/flakeCheck/humanSignoff); (4) replacement validators enforce top-level closed keys (closes the C.1 smuggled-verdict loophole) + notes + non-negative timing. +15 parity tests. Re-verifying R2.

Cross-provider verification R2 (gpt-5-4, max_tier pinned per L-064-7) PASS: all 6 R1 findings resolved (cited file:line), regression check A/B/C/E all PASS, example fixtures still conform, no new defects. ~$0.554 R2 + $0.342 R1. Full suite GREEN 1953/5.

Routed S6 next-session rec (sonnet-4-6, stale name mapped + orchestrator caveat: S6 ships a release, treat effort>=medium). Wrote disposition.json (VERIFIED). Cited L-066-1/L-064-10/L-064-7/L-064-6/L-064-9. Committing + close_session.
